title: Beast's Mod
description: Adds QOL Features, makes cool additions along with trying to stay close to vanilla.
body:
Here's a cool mod, made by **ME**, a goofy developer new to Fabric!

Adds QOL Features, makes goofy additions along with trying to stay close to vanilla.

![A showcase of the items currently available in the mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf0b022eb199460f827d0e4869fb09fdc44ab84d.jpeg)

**_Current Feature List:_**
QOL Features: 
  -Villagers don't run out of stock if max level.
  -Trident Recipe using a custom Trident Hilt item.
  -Sulfur which drops from soul sand, used to craft gunpowder.

Cool Features:
  -Adds a new music disc found in ocean ruins: Flowing Symphony
